meta.notes: Fires any star-chart award prompts due now for the token owner's household. The endpoint publishes the one-tap 'did they earn a star?' push to BOTH parents itself (native ntfy/Pushover delivery), so no publish node is needed. Runs every 15 min; each chart's schedule (weekdays + time, set on the /kids dashboard) decides when it actually asks, and last_prompted_at dedups to once per local day. Use a household member's per-user token so delivery resolves that household. Point the URL at your Prefrontal host (Tailscale addr if n8n runs elsewhere).
